winner: none — no world design was ever produced (18/18 designer attempts interrupted with zero output), so there is no winner to synthesize from. The Synthesize step must author the master spec directly from the WORLD_BRIEF using the verified scaffolding in 'grafts', or the orchestrator must re-run the three designers with the root-cause fix in 'flaws' (inline a pre-digested data.ts summary instead of demanding a full read). Do NOT re-run the judge again without design text — it will produce this same verdict.
grafts: VERIFIED XP ANCHORS (re-checked against src/sim/types.ts:389-418): XP 6->13 = 46,500 (3600+4500+5400+6500+7600+8800+10100); 13->20 = 113,100 (11400+12900+14400+16000+17700+19400+21300). XP_TABLE already contains vanilla values through L20 — no table work needed, only MAX_LEVEL plumbing. Kill XP = 45+5*mobLevel at level, +5%/level above (cap +20%); gray cutoff zeroDiff = 5 (player<=7), 6 (8-9), 7 (10-15), 8 (16+). Elite XP mult = 2 (sim.ts:1570). GROUP_XP_BONUS = [1,1,1.166,1.3,1.43] with per-member XP divided by party size (sim.ts:1595).

ZONE-1 CARRY-OVER (recomputed by summing QUESTS in data.ts:1098-1225): existing 13 quests pay exactly 7,810 quest XP; with ~90 required kills at avg ~70 XP and 1.6x overshoot, players reach ~L7 from solo content and 8-10 via the Hollow Crypt (13 elite spawns: 12 trash incl. miniboss Sexton Marrow + Morthen; q_hollow pays 1,500 XP + 1g). Zone 2 must therefore catch players at 6-7 via a breadcrumb (minLevel 6) from Brother Aldric/Marshal Redbrook, with the crypt as the 8-10 group spike breadcrumbed back from the new hub.

ZONE-2 BUDGET TEMPLATE THAT BALANCES: gross target 46,500 * 1.10-1.20 = 51,150-55,800. ~15-16 quests averaging ~1,300 XP (rising 800->2,000 by chain depth) = ~21,000 quest XP; remainder ~30,000-35,000 from kills at ~95 XP/kill (mobs L8-12) = ~330 effective kills; / 1.6 overshoot = ~205 quest-required kills = counts of 10-15 across 10-12 kill/collect quests as staged two-part chains on the same camps (matches zone-1 norms of 8-10 per quest).

ZONE-3 BUDGET TEMPLATE THAT BALANCES (with corrected dungeon math): gross target 113,100 * 1.10-1.20 = 124,410-135,720. ~17-18 quests averaging ~2,800 XP (2,000->4,500) = ~48,000-50,000 quest XP; remainder ~75,000-85,000 from kills at ~125 XP/kill (mobs L13-19) = ~640 effective kills = ~86 kills/level (normal classic pacing); / 1.6 = ~400 required kills via two-stage chains plus 2-3 outdoor elite group arcs (2x XP). The 19->20 stretch (21,300 XP) must be carried by the final-dungeon LEAD-UP CHAIN quest XP (4-5 quests at 3,500-4,500 each, solo-able at 18-19) — NOT by dungeon clears (see flaws: a full 5-man clear nets only ~2,300 trash XP per member).

PACING STRUCTURE TO BAKE IN: breadcrumb quests hub-to-hub at minLevel 6 and 12-13; each new hub front-loads 3-4 quests on the nearest 2 camps so the first 30 minutes have zero dead travel; roads (polylines) between hubs with camps 40-90 yd off-road; final dungeon entry gated minLevel 18, suggestedPlayers 5; Hollow Crypt gets 2-4 added build-up quests using the existing sigil pattern (ground-sparkle collect, like gravecaller_sigil) so the user's 'riveting crypt' requirement is met without new engine work.

STORY SPINE SALVAGE (the one fixed point all three lenses shared via the brief): Morthen is the opening act; q_whispers already plants the hook — Aldric's line 'the mark of the Gravecallers, a sect I had prayed was extinct' (data.ts:1177). Make the Gravecallers servants of a greater zone-3 villain; have Brother Aldric (and one zone-2 native, e.g. the weaponsmith or a marshal's scout) physically recur in zone 2 and 3 so reveals land with known faces; per-class rewards only need 3 archetype entries thanks to REWARD_ARCHETYPE (data.ts:1234).

DO NOT REDO COMPLETED WORK: three sibling design specs already exist as journal results in wf_0c329a02-def/journal.jsonl — ability ranks 1-20 for all nine classes (18.2K chars), the full procedural icon system spec (27.7K chars), and the graphics overhaul plan (25.2K chars). Synthesis should incorporate them by reference, not regenerate them.
flaws: BLOCKING: there is no winning design to synthesize. The synthesis prompt will interpolate zero DESIGN blocks (same .filter(d => d.text) behavior that emptied the judge prompt). Either re-run the three designers after fixing the root cause below, or instruct the synthesizer to author the complete master spec itself from the WORLD_BRIEF + the grafts here: story arc continuing the Gravecaller plot, zone 2 (6-13), zone 3 (13-20) with hubs/NPCs/mobs/camps/quests, Hollow Crypt build-up quests, level-20 final dungeon, item/vendor/food tables.

ROOT CAUSE TO FIX IN THE WORKFLOW: all 18 designer attempts were interrupted ('[Request interrupted by user]') while still chunk-reading data.ts — they never reached the writing stage. Fix: inline a pre-digested content summary (quest/mob/NPC/camp tables, ~2K tokens) directly into the designer prompt, or scope the read to data.ts:892-1463 (mobs/NPCs/quests/camps/world) and types.ts:383-418 (XP formulas) instead of 'READ FIRST: all of it'. Also raise or remove the per-agent timeout that produced the ~16-27-minute interrupt waves.

XP MATH ERROR IN THE PREVIOUS JUDGE'S VERDICT — CORRECT IT IN SYNTHESIS: it budgeted 'a full final-dungeon clear = ~8,000+ XP per run' as a band-top soak. Actual sim math (sim.ts:1595) divides kill XP by party size after the 1.43 group bonus: per member = mobXp * 2 * 1.43 / 5 = 0.572x solo. A 28-elite-kill L19-20 dungeon nets ~2,300 trash XP per member (28 * ~290 * 0.572), and a Hollow Crypt clear ~650. Dungeon runs are loot/story events, not XP soaks — the 18->20 budget must come from lead-up chain quest XP.

BAND-COVERAGE GUARDRAIL: zone 2 needs mobs up to L12+ and zone 3 up to L19+ or kill XP collapses at the top of each band under the gray cutoff (zeroDiff 7 at player 10-15, 8 at 16+). Verify every level 6-19 has at-level mobs within its zone.

SOFT GAP AT 7-9: zone-1 solo content runs dry around L7 and the crypt is a 5-man spike, not solo progression. Zone 2's first 4-5 quests (minLevel 6, mobs L7-9) must single-handedly carry 7->9 for solo players; front-load accordingly.

QUEST XP CEILING: keep any single quest's XP at or below ~25% of a level at its intended level (existing ceiling: q_hollow 1,500 vs 6,500 needed at L10 = 23%). The zone-3 lead-up chain at 3,500-4,500 per quest vs 19,400-21,300 per level (18-19%) respects this.

ECONOMY CONTINUITY: zone-1 quests pay 75-500c (q_hollow 1g = 10,000c). Scale zone 2 to ~2-8s per quest and zone 3 to ~10-30s; price vendor white gear so a full band set costs roughly that band's total quest copper; food/drink tiers must match hp/mana pools at L13 and L20 (consume window fixed at 18s).

ID HYGIENE: all new ids snake_case and collision-checked against existing data.ts ids (q_*, mobs like tunnel_rat/morthen/gorrak, items like gravecaller_*); new mob families limited to primitive-rig-buildable ones; cap new boss mechanics at 2-3 simple types (summon adds, enrage <30% hp, frontal breath) and flag each as sim work alongside the existing aoePulse.

winner: none — all three world designs are missing; every designer attempt crashed with empty output, so the Synthesize step must author the master spec directly from the WORLD_BRIEF (or the workflow should re-run the three designers, ideally with the data.ts read scoped down to the mobs/quests/world sections to avoid whatever killed 18 straight attempts)
grafts: VERIFIED XP BUDGET (use as-is): 6->13 needs 46,500 (3600+4500+5400+6500+7600+8800+10100); 13->20 needs 113,100 (11400+12900+14400+16000+17700+19400+21300); total 6->20 = 159,600. Kill XP at-level = 45+5*mobLevel: zone-2 mobs L8-12 average ~95 XP/kill; zone-3 mobs L13-19 average ~125 XP/kill; elites double it; group multipliers 1.166/1.3/1.43 already exist (GROUP_XP_BONUS in data.ts).

ZONE 1 CARRY-OVER (recomputed from data.ts): existing 13 quests award 7,810 quest XP total; with kill XP this lands players at ~6-7, and the Hollow Crypt (elite 2x XP trash, Morthen L10, q_hollow 1,500 XP) bridges 9->10. Zone 2's band should therefore be designed as 6/7->13 with the crypt as the mid-band group spike at 9-10, breadcrumbed from the new zone-2 hub.

ZONE 2 BUDGET TEMPLATE THAT BALANCES: target 46,500 * 1.10-1.20 = 51,150-55,800 total. 15-16 quests averaging ~1,300 XP (rising 800->2,000 by chain depth) = ~21,000 quest XP; remaining ~32,000-35,000 from kills = ~350 effective kills at 95 XP; divided by the 1.6x overshoot factor = ~220 quest-required kills, i.e. 12-15 counts across 10-12 kill/collect quests plus chains. These counts match existing zone-1 norms (8-10 per quest) when split into staged chains on the same camps.

ZONE 3 BUDGET TEMPLATE THAT BALANCES: target 113,100 * 1.10-1.20 = 124,400-135,700. 17-18 quests averaging ~2,800 XP (2,000->4,000, consistent with the game's curve where q_hollow pays 1,500 at L10) = ~48,000-50,000 quest XP; remaining ~78,000-85,000 from kills = ~640 effective kills at 125 XP = ~86 kills/level, which is normal classic pacing; with the 1.6x overshoot only ~400 quest-required kills are needed = 20-25 per camp via two-stage chains (kill 10-12, then follow-up 12-15 on the same camp), plus 2-3 elite group quests (2x XP/kill) and a full final-dungeon clear (~25-30 elite kills at 2x ~140 XP = ~8,000+ per run) to soak the top of the band.

PACING STRUCTURE TO BAKE IN: breadcrumb quest from Brother Aldric/the Marshal to the zone-2 hub at minLevel 6, and from zone 2 to zone 3 at minLevel 12-13; each hub front-loads 3-4 quests on the same 2 camps so the first 30 minutes have zero dead travel; roads (polylines) between hubs with camps placed 40-90 yd off-road; final dungeon entry quest gated minLevel 18 with suggestedPlayers 5.

ENGINE-PALETTE REMINDERS for the synthesizer (already paid-for capabilities): kill/collect objectives only, requiresQuest chains, minLevel gates, ground sparkle objects for non-kill story beats (the Gravecaller sigil pattern), rare spawns on long timers (Old Greyjaw pattern), aoePulse boss mechanic exists; cap new boss mechanics at 2-3 simple ones (summon adds, enrage below 30% hp, frontal breath) and flag each as sim work.
flaws: BLOCKING: there is no winning design to synthesize from. The synthesis prompt will interpolate zero DESIGN blocks (same .filter(d => d.text) behavior). The synthesizer must either be re-run after the three designers are retried, or must write the complete master spec itself from the WORLD_BRIEF requirements: story arc continuing the Gravecaller plot, zone 2 (6-13) and zone 3 (13-20) with hubs/NPCs/mobs/camps/quests, Hollow Crypt build-up quests, level-20 final dungeon, item/vendor tables.

ROOT CAUSE TO FIX IN THE WORKFLOW: all 18 designer attempts died after the initial data.ts read with zero assistant output. Re-runs should scope the read (data.ts lines 892-1357 cover mobs/NPCs/quests/camps/world; types.ts lines 189-220 and 383-417 cover QuestDef and XP formulas) instead of demanding 'READ FIRST: all of it'.

XP MATH GUARDRAILS the synthesized spec must satisfy (verify against these exact numbers): zone-2 total (quest XP + 1.6x-overshoot kill XP at 45+5*L) in 51,150-55,800; zone-3 total in 124,400-135,700; no quest's XP reward exceeding ~50% of a level at its intended level (existing ceiling: q_hollow 1,500 vs 6,500 needed at L10 = 23%); every band 6-7 through 19-20 must have at-level mobs available given the gray-band cutoff (zeroDiff = 7 at L10-15, 8 at L16+), so zone 2 needs mobs to L12 and zone 3 to L19 minimum or kill XP collapses at band top.

DUNGEON PLACEMENT MATH: the Hollow Crypt is the only group content and sits at L10; the spec must not leave the 14-17 stretch spike-free — add at least one outdoor elite group quest arc (suggestedPlayers 3) in zone 3 mid-band, and place the final dungeon lead-up chain so its non-dungeon quests are completable solo at 18-19.

ECONOMY CONTINUITY: copper rewards must scale with the existing curve (zone 1 pays 75-500c per quest, q_hollow 1g) — zone 2 should land ~2-8s per quest, zone 3 ~10-30s, vendor white gear priced so a full set costs roughly the band's quest copper income; food/drink tiers need foodHp/drinkMana roughly matching new hp/mana pools at 13 and 20 (18s consume window is fixed).

ID HYGIENE: all new ids must be snake_case and collision-checked against existing data.ts ids (q_*, mob ids like tunnel_rat/morthen/gorrak, item ids like gravecaller_*); the existing REWARD_ARCHETYPE fallback (warrior/rogue/mage) means item rewards only need 3 entries per quest.

NO DESIGN TEXT EXISTS (agent-a27bd84e97623488a.jsonl and retries, zero assistant output). What I COULD verify against the live engine (src/sim/data.ts, src/sim/types.ts @ commit 2d05cc2): XP_TABLE already extends to L20 with the exact vanilla values and MAX_LEVEL=20; mobXpValue(45+5*L with vanilla zero-diff bands) and GROUP_XP_BONUS exist; ZoneDef/zoneAt already model a north-running zone strip with unused biomes 'marsh' and 'peaks' ready; DungeonDef supports multiple instances via index x-bands. The judge-verified budget targets and a palette-checked fallback skeleton are in grafts/flaws so the synthesis step is not blocked.

winner: NONE of A/B/C — no design text was ever produced (all designer agents crashed with empty output; verified in transcripts). Synthesis should proceed from the judge-authored, engine-verified fallback skeleton in grafts rather than re-looping the failed designers.
grafts: FALLBACK ZONE 2 (palette-verified): 'Mirefen Marsh', biome 'marsh' (already in BiomeId, src/sim/data.ts:1411), appended to ZONES as z-band 180..540 with hub hamlet ~(0,300) + graveyard + lakes — zone 1 geography untouched (zoneAt/WORLD_MIN_Z/MAX_Z derive from the ZONES array, so adding bands is the engine-intended path). Levels 7-13. Camps reuse existing families (murloc deepfen, spider mire-widows, undead drowned-dead, humanoid Gravecaller cultists) + ONE new family 'troll' (hunched humanoid primitive rig, cheap). Story: Morthen (existing Hollow Crypt boss) was only an acolyte — the cult's Mistcaller is drowning-and-raising an army in the fen; hooks chain from Brother Aldric via a breadcrumb quest gated minLevel 7 (NOT requiresQuest q_hollow, so solo players aren't locked out of zone 2 by a 5-player quest).

FALLBACK ZONE 2 DUNGEON: 'The Sunken Bastion', 5-player ~L13, DungeonDef index 1 (instanceOrigin x-band 1500). Reuse interior 'crypt' builder initially (DungeonDef.interior is currently the literal type 'crypt' — widening it is a one-line type change but each NEW interior costs renderer+collider work; reuse is the cheap path). Boss: Vael the Mistcaller — aoePulse (existing) + NEW MECHANIC #1: summonAdds {mobId, count, atHpPct:[0.6,0.3]} — the simplest high-value new mechanic, one spawn call on hp thresholds.

FALLBACK ZONE 3: 'Thornpeak Heights', biome 'peaks' (already in BiomeId), z-band 540..900, hub 'Highwatch' ~(0,660). Levels 13-20. TWO more new families max: 'ogre' (scaled-up humanoid rig) and 'elemental' (floating primitive chunks, no limbs — cheapest rig of all). Dragonkin ONLY for the final boss model. Elite ogre war-camps as suggestedPlayers:2-3 group quests (elite = 2x XP, closes the late-level XP gap). Finale: the cult serves Korzul the Gravewyrm; epic L20 5-player dungeon 'Gravewyrm Sanctum' (index 2): elite trash, miniboss pair (bound ogre guardian; grand-necromancer with summonAdds), Korzul with aoePulse + NEW MECHANIC #2: enrage {belowHpPct:0.3, dmgMult:1.5} — a two-field multiplier check, trivially deterministic. Cap new mechanics at these 2; frontal breath needs facing-cone math, defer it.

FROM THE SIBLING DESIGNERS THAT DID COMPLETE (results in wf_0c329a02-def/journal.jsonl): the ranks designer's tuning anchors — mob hp ≈ 40+18L (L14≈292, L20≈400, elite x2.3), exactly ONE new AbilityEffect type (finisherStun) for all 9 classes' L1-20 kits, and two new conjured-water ranks; the icons designer's iconId-recipe architecture (sim carries only a string; all drawing in src/ui/icons/); the graphics designer's 11-step tiered renderer plan keyed off ?gfx tier. The synthesis doc should cite these as the companion specs for tasks #5, #7, #8 rather than redesigning them.

QUEST-DESIGN RULES VERIFIED AGAINST THE PALETTE: only 'kill' and 'collect' objectives exist (QuestDef, src/sim/types.ts:189-211) — no escort/explore/use-object quests, reject any in synthesis; collect via loot-table questId entries (drop-gated to active quest) or GROUND_OBJECTS sparkles; chains via requiresQuest, gates via minLevel, group content via suggestedPlayers; item rewards need only 3 variants thanks to REWARD_ARCHETYPE (warrior/rogue/mage fallback, data.ts:1234). Each new hub needs vendor NPCs with buyValue'd food/drink/white-gear (feeds task #6).
flaws: XP MATH (judge-verified, binding on synthesis): 6->13 = 46,500 and 13->20 = 113,100 — both confirmed exact against XP_TABLE in src/sim/types.ts:389. Zone 1 calibration: existing 13 quests total 7,810 reward XP = 0.70x of the 1->7 requirement (11,200), with objective kills lifting total content to ~1.5-1.6x. Synthesis MUST match that ratio: zone 2 quest rewards ≈ 30-35k XP (~20-22 quests averaging ~1,500), zone 3 quest rewards ≈ 75-80k XP (~26-30 quests averaging ~2,700-3,000).

LATE-GAME GRIND GAP IS THE #1 RISK: at-level kill XP is only 110-145 at L13-19 while 17->20 alone needs 58,400 XP (~150 grind kills per level). A zone 3 with 28 quests at vanilla-ish rewards (avg 2,800) + ~18 effective kills/quest yields ~142.9k = only 1.26x of 113,100 — short of the 1.6x cushion. Synthesis must close it with elite group-quest camps (2x XP/kill), two dungeon quest chains paying 4-6k each, and reward averages nearer 3,000, or add quests to 32+. Also compute overshoot against green-level kills (mobXpValue decays with level diff and zeroes at the zeroDiff band), not at-level kills.

OVERSHOOT ON THE 6->13 SEAM: zone 1 only carries to L7 (11,200 XP of need vs ~17k content); players hit Mirefen at 6-7, so budget zone 2 against the full 46,500 (6->13), not 42,900 — i.e. design to ~64-70k total zone-2 content XP.

ENGINE TYPE CHANGES SYNTHESIS MUST LIST EXPLICITLY: (1) MobFamily union (src/sim/types.ts:99) needs +troll/+ogre/+elemental (+dragonkin for one boss) and each needs a primitive rig in the renderer — cap at 3 new rigs + 1 boss model; (2) DungeonDef.interior literal 'crypt' (src/sim/data.ts:1316) must widen to a union; (3) exactly 2 new boss mechanics (summonAdds, enrage) added to MobTemplate, both deterministic and pulse-timer-like in sim.ts; (4) new dungeons take index 1 and 2 (instanceOrigin x-bands already generalize).

WORKFLOW BUG THE PARENT MUST FIX BEFORE ANY RE-RUN: all 3 world-designer agents produced empty output across ~6 retries each (zero assistant text; later retries died on API socket errors) — likely from single-shot Reads of the 34K-token src/sim/data.ts blowing context. Re-run designers with chunked reads (the file now hard-caps at 25K tokens/read) or hand them a condensed palette digest. And make the judge step fail loudly when designs.filter(d => d.text) yields fewer than 3 entries instead of silently sending judges an empty prompt — this exact silent-drop already burned two full judge rounds (see agent-a806036714c6ef470 result in journal.jsonl).
